name: Hero's Defiance

spell.name: Hero's Defiance
spell.trigger: An attack would bring you to 0 Hit Points.

text: You shout in defiance and are filled with a burst of healing. Just before applying the attack's damage, you recover 6d8+20 Hit Points. If this is enough to prevent the attack from bringing you to 0 Hit Points, you don't become unconscious or dying. Either way, cheating death is difficult, and you can't use *hero's defiance* again until you Refocus or make your daily preparations. *Hero's defiance* can't be used against effects with the death trait or that would leave no remains, such as *disintegrate*.
